name: South Shaver Pawn shop
description_short: South Shaver Pawn Shop offers collateral-based loans at their South Houston location. Operating under the FirstCash brand, they provide pawn services with extended weekday hours.
description_long: South Shaver Pawn Shop is a pawn retail location operated by FirstCash, a national pawn and financial services company. The shop is situated at 3716 Shaver Street in South Houston, Texas, and serves the local community with traditional pawn lending services. As part of the FirstCash network, the location benefits from established operational standards and corporate support. The company operates a physical storefront in an accessible South Houston location with consistent hours throughout the week. FirstCash is a publicly traded company with a significant presence in the pawn industry, operating hundreds of locations across North America. South Shaver Pawn Shop offers the core services typical of pawn operations: customers can pledge personal items as collateral in exchange for immediate cash loans. The shop accepts a variety of items including jewelry, electronics, tools, musical instruments, and other valuables. Loans are short-term, typically 30-90 days, with interest rates and terms determined by state regulations and company policy. Customers who repay their loans can retrieve their items; items not reclaimed are sold in-store or online. The operation is distinguished by its corporate backing through FirstCash, which provides standardized practices and potentially more consistent loan terms than independent pawn shops. The extended Monday-Friday hours (9 AM to 7 PM) accommodate working customers. The company operates under FirstCash's established brand reputation and operational framework. For consumers in immediate financial need with valuable items to pledge, pawn shops offer an alternative to traditional credit products. However, pawn loans carry implicit costs—the primary risk is item loss if unable to repay, and interest rates, while regulated, can be substantial. This service is best suited for those with collateral but limited access to conventional credit, or those needing emergency funds without credit checks.
pros: Located in accessible South Houston neighborhood with street-level address
Extended Monday-Friday hours until 7 PM accommodates working customers
Backed by FirstCash, a major national pawn operator with corporate standards
No credit check required for pawn loans—based solely on item collateral value
Immediate cash available same-day upon item appraisal and loan approval
Direct phone contact available at (713) 944-2270 for loan inquiries
Weekend hours available for customer convenience (Saturday and Sunday operations)
cons: Risk of permanent item loss if unable to repay loan within terms
Interest and fees on pawn loans can be substantial depending on loan term and amount
Limited publicly available information about specific loan terms, rates, or maximum loan amounts on their web presence
Sunday hours are limited (12 PM-5 PM) compared to weekday availability
Pawn loans are short-term solutions that do not build credit history
best_for: Individuals needing emergency cash quickly with collateral but poor or no credit history
People with valuable items (jewelry, electronics, instruments) who need short-term bridge financing
Consumers seeking alternatives to payday loans or title loans for immediate liquidity
Those in South Houston area with limited access to traditional credit products
diagnosis: South Shaver Pawn Shop is best for consumers in South Houston who need immediate cash and own valuable collateral but lack access to traditional credit due to poor credit history or urgent timing. The primary caveat is that pawning items carries inherent risk of loss if unable to repay, and the loans are expensive short-term solutions that do not improve credit standing.
services: Pawn loans against personal collateral (jewelry, electronics, instruments, tools)
Immediate cash disbursement upon loan approval
In-store item redemption and loan repayment
Sale of unredeemed pawn items in physical store
Weekend and extended weekday customer service access
meta_description: South Shaver Pawn Shop in South Houston offers pawn services and collateral-based loans with extended hours.
